reset files & cache.command: git checkout -- tests/unit/WadRayMath.t.sol tests/unit/Spoke/Liquidations/Spoke.LiquidationCall.t.sol src/libraries/math/MathUtils.sol && npx hardhat clean

edit & compile Solidity test with min de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> tests/unit/WadRayMath.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

edit & compile Solidity test with max de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> tests/unit/Spoke/Liquidations/Spoke.LiquidationCall.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

edit & compile Solidity contract: src/li.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> src/libraries/math/MathUtils.sol && npx hardhat compile
